calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Mandatory Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ERIK REINERTSON, ESQ. of Law Offices of Thomas M. Bruen APC, Tel No. 925-295-3135 appearing for the Plaintiffs;
Atty. SANELA CAUSEVIC, ESQ. of LaMore, Brazier & Oneal, Tel No. 408-484-6500 appearing for Cross-Defendant Santa Clara Valley Water District;
Atty. CHARLES A. KOSS, ESQ. of Gagen, McCoy, McMahon, Koss, Markowitz & Raines, Tel No. 925-837-0585 appearing telephonically for Defendant/Cross-Complainant Dillard Trucking, Inc.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT SANTA CLARA VALLEY WATER DISTRICT'S motion to change venue is granted. This case is transferred to San Mateo County. The transfer is mandatory per Code of Civil Procedure 394 and Ohio Casualty Ins. Group v. Sup. Court (1994) 30 Cal. App.4th 444. The Water District, as the moving party, has the obligation to pay the transfer fees, but since it is exempt from payment of the fees, no fees are required for the transfer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DILLARD TRUCKING, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue is off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DILLARD TRUCKING, INC. DBA DILLARD ENVIRONMENTAL's Motion For Change Of Venue
is continued to November 18, 2015 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the [moving/opposition/reply] papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 28, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg
